Id1.text: Alvah Sabin was the Secretary of State of Vermont before Homer Elihu Royce.

Id2.text: Alvah Sabin worked as the Secretary of State of Vermont and was succeeded by Homer Elihu Royce.

Id3.text: Alvah Sabin was the Secretary of the State of Vermont he was succeeded by Homer Elihu Royce.
